description: Use this API to change the status of the FACTS device model at a specified FACTS device. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = fctmod_status(fd, status)

parameters.name: fd
parameters.description: Quoted name of the facts device for which the model status is to be changed; if an unquoted integer value is specified, the api converts it to a left-justified name. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: no model at this FACTS device.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
